chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-192 of 2026 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Hearing 1. For hearing of CMA No.807/2026 2. For hearing of main case 30.01.2026. Mr. Muhammad Adnan Motan, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Respondent No.2. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan A.A.G. --------------- Learned counsel for the Petitioner does not press the instant Petition and submits that the Petitioner would otherwise avail his remedy in accordance with law. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
